The '''Balti''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of furry bipeds with prominent tusks. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Bingo Mehndra]] was a Balti.

Rather than a [[Birthday/Legends|birthday]] or a hatching day, Balti celebrated their "[[Spawning Day]]."

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Balti strongly resembles the [[Khormai/Legends|Khormai]] species.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|6|A Hot Time in the Cold Town Tonite!}} {{1st}}
